raw.message: ピクミンと毎日を過ごして、仲良し度をあげよう

hook.summary: Pikmin gathering in a field with a text question.
hook.visual_action: Various Pikmin types are seen interacting with everyday objects on a green lawn.
hook.text_overlay: スマホでピクミンを育てられる？

scene_flow: Introduction of Pikmin in a field with a question about growing them on a smartphone.
Gameplay footage showing the planting of Pikmin seedlings in virtual pots.
A player character walking through a park with Pikmin following behind.
Visual demonstration of Pikmin growing and appearing on screen.
Final call-to-action screen with the game title and download link.
on_screen_text: スマホでピクミンを育てられる？
audience_proxy: Casual mobile users and Nintendo fans looking for a relaxing, outdoor-oriented collection game.
